title: 2 Pack Qtip Holder Thick Glass Apothecary Jars with Lid for Bathroom Decor, Clear Cotton Ball Storage Organizer for Cotton Swab, Cotton Rounds, Jewelry, Candy
description:
About this item
Glass
Classy Elegant Look: Diamond faceted glass, thick and look expensive, they would truly make your bathroom look very classy and add to the ambience! When bathroom lights are turned on, they look so pretty on the counter and shine
Material: Made of premium thick glass without sharp edges, heavier and thicker than ordinary glass, heavy duty sturdy and durable. Apothecary jars have crystal color, will made something as mundane as cotton swabs / pads, into a lovely adornment, decorative and functional
Ideal Size: 3.35" Wide, 5.5" Height, includes 2 pack jars. 10oz Q-tip dispenser, just the right size for Q tip, cotton ball, swab, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampon, bath salts, hair organizer, makeup sponges, makeup brush, beauty egg, face brush, crayons, pens, clip etc. Perfect size will enhances the dainty, feminine touch they bring
Modern Design: it looks modern, stylish and very cute, crystal color super gorgeous, perfect home decoration upgrade from the standard plastic holder, suitable for all kinds of farmhouse style. Multi-purpose to meet various needs, such as restroom supplies, apartments, condos, dorm rooms, RVs, campers, shelf, bedroom, also perfect in the kitchen
Perfect Choice: These crystal jars can be placed on the bathroom countertop, guest bath, vanity top, laundry room, makeup table, nightstand, lazy Susan, or dining room table. Ideal for your friends, family, and relatives on many occasions, such as birthdays, housewarmings, weddings, Thanksgiving, Halloween, and Christmas
reviews_5s:
I redecorated our primary bedroom in a vintage style and was looking for a few accessories. These are perfect. They can certainly be used in the bathroom for cotton balls, Q-tips, etc.I wanted something to put cotton balls and Q-tips in and these are perfect. I purchased the larger size after reading reviews that the Q-tips did not fit in the smaller size. Perfect size and works well with my bathroom decor.Play Video
Great storage jars for our bathroom! Good quality, arrived on time and in perfect condition! Absolutely love the vintage style and craftsmanship of these apothecary jars. My only negative concern is the 10oz doesn’t hold Q-tips, it’s just a smidge too small to put the lid on. I just put them in the larger container so problem solved! Highly recommend!We use one of these for q-tips and one for my re-usable makeup wipes, love the size and how they make the bathroom feel a bit classier.These are good quality, heavier than I expected and exactly what I was looking for to store q-tips and cotton pads in our master bathroom. They’re very pretty and I love the vintage style. The price can’t be beat, even cheaper than similar containers at Home Goods.So, I needed something to hold my q-tips so I could remember to actually use them to clean my dog’s ears (I legit have never had to do this) and I was thinking about just getting a boring container but then I came across these. Now, normally I would have just gone with a the jar that matches my soap dispenser. But these goe great reviews and they looked super pretty so I went with them. Totally the best decision I’ve ever made! Just buy them. If you are reading this review, you are clearly interested, so just hit “add to cart” because they are well made, very shiny, and they make organizing my stuff a breeze! I got the smaller size and they hold a ton of q-tips and cotton rounds but also would hold a ton of cotton balls. They are well made - they seem durable and were packaged very well!I use the larger one (which is not that large) for makeup removal cotton pads. It looks pretty on my makeup counter. The small one would be ok for qtips.I bought this to use as a candle holder and I am very pleased! The color is really pretty and reflects the candle light beautifullyI use the big one for cotton balls and the smaller ones for q-tips and flossersLoved these containers for Q-tips and cotton balls. They are beautiful and pretty heavy. Everything arrived safely and it’s perfect on my vanity!
reviews_1s: The qtips are too tall for the container. Poor design.Received item and glass completely shattered on arrival. Very disappointing. Buyer beware.It was delivered by the post office and when I picked it up I could hear glass broken in the box. I opened it and the entire item was shattered.Si me gustaron pero uno me llegó roto ,tienen q tener un poco más de cuidado con la mercancía
